readings.summary: The Lord's justice is about to be revealed.

readings.citation:
Ps 67:2-3, 5, 6, 8, R. v.4
O God, let all the nations praise you!
readings.antiphon:
Ps 67:2-3, 5, 6, 8, R. v.4
O God, let all the nations praise you!

readings.summary:
Jesus proclaimed the Gospel of the kingdom
and cured every disease among the people.
A Canaanite woman asks Jesus to heal her daughter.

antiphons.text:
With the Lord there is mercy;
in him is plentiful redemption.

I am the living bread that came down from heaven,
says the Lord.
Whoever eats of this bread will live for ever.
